statusDetail: Fully agentic false-positive guard. Re-running the same evidence-gathering against ?mode=fixed (where each scenario ships its corrected CSS). The model confirmed every seeded condition is now satisfied, so it reports none of the six seeded findings.

page.notes: ?mode=fixed serves the corrected stylesheet for every scenario (light-dark(), prefers-reduced-motion gate, fluid max-width, :focus-visible, reserved min-height, @container).

evidenceUsed: computed-styles probe (evaluate) under prefers-color-scheme: dark and prefers-reduced-motion: reduce

conditions: component reused at two container widths

verifiedConditions.fixed-layout: no scenario element overflows the 360px viewport (only the 58px playground-frame residual remains)
verifiedConditions.no-container-queries: card in the narrow container computes flex-direction = column

eval.note: Zero seeded findings in fixed mode. The false-positive guard passes.
